_comment: Day Day Slack App Manifest — Growth & SEO Agent. Create at api.slack.com/apps → 'Create New App' → 'From Manifest'.

display_information.name: Day Day
display_information.description: BakedBot's Growth & SEO Agent. Monitors search performance, finds ranking opportunities, and creates content for bakedbot.ai.
display_information.long_description: Day Day is BakedBot's Growth & SEO Agent. He monitors Google Search Console and GA4, finds low-competition ranking opportunities, researches the latest SEO trends (AI Overviews, E-E-A-T, topical authority), drafts blog posts and lead magnets, and submits content for approval. Lives in #ceo and answers growth questions from Martez.

_setup_notes.step_1: Go to api.slack.com/apps → 'Create New App' → 'From Manifest' → paste this JSON
_setup_notes.step_2: Install the app to your workspace
_setup_notes.step_3: Copy the Bot User OAuth Token (xoxb-...) → add to GCP Secret Manager as SLACK_DAYDAY_BOT_TOKEN
_setup_notes.step_4: Copy the Signing Secret → add as SLACK_DAYDAY_SIGNING_SECRET
_setup_notes.step_5: Copy the App ID → add as SLACK_DAYDAY_APP_ID
_setup_notes.step_6: Add these 3 secrets to apphosting.yaml (follow the SLACK_ELROY_* pattern at lines 409-418)
_setup_notes.step_7: Wire SLACK_DAYDAY_APP_ID in slack-agent-bridge.ts (same pattern as SLACK_ELROY_APP_ID at line 908)
_setup_notes.dream_loop: Day Day is in DREAM_AGENT_GROUPS.role_agents — runs overnight via /api/cron/dream-loop with other role agents
_setup_notes.content_approval_channel: #ceo — submit_for_approval posts with Approve/Decline buttons for Martez
